title: DungeonCore
description: A large-scale project featuring a pleasant fantasy RPG build with a large amount of content that is suitable for modification and enjoyable survival
body:
# General

**DungeonCore** - This is a fairly large **RPG modpack**, which contains the largest RPG mods.
This modpack requires a datapack that is included in the build, as it is a large modpack with many parameters. I recommend going through the configuration and performing the initial setup (part of the configuration has already been changed).


## ⚠️ Highly Recommended External Mods

The following mods are highly recommended, but cannot be included in this modpack on Modrinth due to licensing restrictions:

**PassiveSkillTree-1.20.1-BETA-0.6.14a-all**

**born_in_chaos_[Forge]1.20.1_1.7.2**

**luckys_armory-0.4.0.2-forge-1.20.1**

**vs_sup_fix-1.20.1-forge-1.3**


👉 Download them from their official pages (e.g., CurseForge).

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37ee9b2741841a2a41731909569d7521e0c2fd39_0.webp)
